Data

Explore the data

Explore the Policy Preferences Lab’s datasets. Download the full replication packages. Build and export charts using the interactive data visualisation tool.

Source discipline: the explorer only publishes aggregate indicators and now hides sample-size/demographic-only measures from the public chart options. Fossil-fuel-subsidy rows are derived from cleaned weighted microdata; tax-morale rows combine uploaded survey microdata, figure datasets and Stata graph outputs.
